name: Strawberry Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients in a large kettle; stir until the sugar is fully dissolved.
2. Place on medium heat and allow to cook. Boil hard for 14 minutes, stirring frequently and watching carefully.
3. Remove from heat and skim off any foam that forms.
4. Pour into shallow pans and let cool several hours or overnight.
5. Transfer to glass jars or containers, add a layer of paraffin (or wax), and seal tightly.
